span.p:
arm guards: batch_crash_active=1
sigsetjmp(batch_crash_jmp)
setjmp(mir_error_jmp); sigsetjmp(batch_timeout_jmp)
alarm(batch_timeout)

SIGKILL worker past hard timeout
then retry lost tests one-per-batch
